entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "Kreirajte geografske kartice"

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "Napravite bljesak kartice za mitozu"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "Pretvori ovu notu u Q&A"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Flashcard Builder on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Praktični vodič za korištenje Flashcard Builder na inspir za vježbanje učenja, s promps, studijske petlje, i sigurniji AI navike.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Jača studijska petlja

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn notes or topics into clear flashcards with answers, traps, and review prompts.
entries.value: AI Flashcard Builder Za aktivni opoziv je fokusiran režim za korištenje AI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Režim se gradi oko određenog posla: Pretvoriti bilješke ili teme u jasne kartice za ponavljanje s odgovorima, zamkama, i recenzije podstiče.

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: practical guide
entries.value: AI Flashcard Builder Za aktivan Podsjetnik: praktični vodič

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI nastavnik

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi korak, a ne konačni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Pitajte AI da provjerite svoje razmišljanje, a ne samo rezultat.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Kartice pitaju jednu stvar odjednom i uključuju zamke kako bi ponavljanje gradilo razumijevanje, a ne samo prepoznavanje.

entries.source: Create recall cards.
entries.value: Kreirajte kartice za opoziv.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Završite pisanjem ideje iz memorije.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Graditelj kartica

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Vježbajte

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Traži da pokušate

entries.source: Reveal answers when ready.
entries.value: Otkrijte odgovore kad ste spremni.

entries.source: Review misses sooner.
entries.value: Pregled propušta ranije.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Flashcard Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Memory Palace. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Pokrenite režim uživo na Flashcard Builder. Ako želite susjedni oblik učenja, pokušajte Memory Palace. Za širi pogled na platformu, pročitajte što AI učeći pratilac treba učiniti za svakoga.

entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.
entries.value: Studenti koji se pripremaju za ispite, učenici jezika i svi koji koriste vježbu prisjećanja.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Recite režimu rada što pokušavate naučiti ili proizvesti.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Ta se razlika pojavljuje u protoku. Umjesto jedne divovske reakcije, najbolje sesije kreću kroz petlju: postaviti cilj, pokušati nešto, dobiti povratne informacije, popraviti slabu tačku, i odabrati sljedeću akciju.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: To je važno. Opštenito chatbot može odgovoriti gotovo na sve, ali režim učenja daje razgovor oblik. To vas potiče prema vrsti razmišljanja, prakse, povratne informacije, ili istraživanja koja pomaže ideja štap.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: To je ista navika za proučavanje s AI bez varanja: zadržati učenika aktivan. AI je najkorisniji kada vam daje povratnu informaciju o vašem razmišljanju.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ovaj režim rada posebno je koristan za učenike koji žele:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Pokušajte korak u svojim riječima.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Koristite Flashcard Builder kada želite sesiju koja počinje brzo, ali još uvijek se prilagođava na vas. Prvi cilj nije da zvuči impresivno. Prvi cilj je da se sljedeći korak osjeća moguće.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: S čime ovaj režim rada pomaže

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Gdje ići sljedeće

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Možete također početi s grubom verzijom vašeg pravog problema. Neuredan prvi prompt je u redu. Sekcija može pojasniti razinu, publiku, rok, i stil nakon što počnete.
